message: I've been slowly working through my household emergency kit, and honestly, having a solid checklist has made the whole thing feel way less overwhelming. Turns out it's mostly stuff you probably have around anyway—water, first aid, flashlights, that kind of thing. Ready.gov has a pretty straightforward breakdown that walks you through it step by step, which I found really helpful instead of just guessing what I might need. What's the one item you always forget to keep stocked?
